focus: Add an embedding/vector/hybrid retrieval experiment path and test whether vector evidence can improve Cranfield metrics.
reason_started: The operator asked to try LLM embeddings and vector search as the next NDCG optimization path.
reason_ended: Vector/hybrid infrastructure was added and local-control evaluation completed, but real LLM embeddings could not run because no embedding provider key was configured.

validators_executed.name: npm run embed:cranfield -- --provider local-hash
validators_executed.evidence: Generated deterministic local-control embeddings for 1,400 Cranfield documents and 225 queries.

validators_executed.name: npm run eval:cranfield:vector
validators_executed.evidence: Vector-only and hybrid local-control evaluations completed; best nDCG@10 was 0.3054, below refined PRF 0.3260.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 35 node tests passed; MDE parser, strengthened traceability validation, fixture index check, and fixture evaluation passed. Final run is recorded in VAL-028.

validators_skipped.name: real LLM embedding generation
validators_skipped.reason: No OPENAI_API_KEY or equivalent embedding provider key was configured.

validators_skipped.name: remote OpenSearch vector index validation
validators_skipped.reason: Deferred until an offline real-embedding run beats the current refined PRF candidate.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
validators_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-018 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

evidence_quality_notes: Local-hash vectors validate the vector/hybrid mechanics but are not LLM embeddings.
The local-control vector signal is below refined PRF and should not be promoted.
A real embedding provider run is required before judging whether LLM embeddings improve Cranfield.
